<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This project is an Express.js API service. When generating code, follow these guidelines:

- Endpoints should be RESTful and follow best practices for naming and structure.
- Validate and sanitize all input parameters.
- Return clear and consistent JSON responses, including error handling.
- Write modular, maintainable, and well-documented code.
- Include unit tests for all endpoints and core logic.
- Use environment variables for configuration when needed.
- Prefer async/await for asynchronous operations.
- Follow common Node.js and Express.js conventions.

Future endpoints may include additional mathematical operations or business logic. Design code to be easily extensible for new routes and features.
